briefs.dall_e_prompt: Professional corporate headshot of Dr. Mara Ellison, a 41-year-old woman, principal research scientist in biotech. Medium-length chestnut-brown hair in a neat side part, subtle under-eye fatigue, intelligent focused eyes, minimal natural makeup, no heavy jewelry. Wardrobe: charcoal blazer over a muted teal blouse (lab-adjacent professional). Expression: calm, serious, slightly guarded. Background: clean light gray seamless. Lighting: soft even studio light, gentle catchlights, no harsh shadows. Photorealistic, high detail, centered head-and-shoulders framing, Canon EOS R5 look. No text, no watermark, no logos, no illustration, no cartoon, no anime, no painterly style.

usage_map.placement_notes: Victim portrait on POI sheet; should read as a normal corporate headshot, not a police booking photo.
